domain: Tibetan jhator / sky burial (Tibet/Himalaya; body offered on charnel-ground to Himalayan + griffon vultures; complete consumption = good-karma acceptance signal, partial/refusal = bad-life rejection signal; multi-stage protocol with pre-sieve + primary offer + re-grind + re-offer when partial)
specific_mechanism: JHATOR-EXTERNAL-JUDGE: multi-stage external-classifier-pool acceptance criterion for LLM output. (1) Diverse external judge pool V = {V_1,...,V_N} with distinct verifier personas/grounding (factual, ethical, format, harmlessness, KB-anchored). (2) Stage-1 quick parallel consensus: each V_i votes accept/reject; if total_accepts ≥ N (full vulture-consumption) → ACCEPT. (3) Stage-2 partial: if k ≤ total_accepts < N → REJECT-PARTIAL → re-grind (rewrite by separate rewriter model focused on disagreement axes) → resubmit. (4) Stage-3 re-offer up to R rounds; ABSOLUTE-REJECT after R rounds. (5) Vulture-pool diversity-promoting selection (different prompt templates + retrieval grounding) to avoid single-classifier consensus collapse.
llm_application: JHATOR-EXTERNAL-JUDGE for LLM output acceptance: diverse external multi-judge pool + completeness-consumption binary acceptance + multi-stage re-grind/re-offer iteration. Differs from Hallucination Survey 2025 (catalog of detection methods — not specific multi-stage re-grind protocol), HalluLens 2504.17550 (benchmark — not iterative re-grind), LLM-Check (external observer — not multi-stage), Internal Representations probe (intrinsic state probe — not external classifier pool). Differs from R359 ETRUSCAN-HARUSPEX (anatomical-zone divination model), R430 KINTSUGI-CRACK (heat-stress diagnostic crack pattern), R418 SUTARTINES-EVAL (close-harmony judge ensemble, single-stage), R445 IFA-BINARY (256-cell binary catalog) by EXPLICIT VULTURE-POOL FULL-CONSUMPTION CRITERION + RE-GRIND ITERATION LOOP.
novelty_claim: Survey Hallucination + HalluLens + LLM-Check + Internal-Representations cover external-classifier LLM hallucination detection. JHATOR-EXTERNAL-JUDGE adds (a) full-consumption N-of-N consensus criterion + (b) multi-stage iterative re-grind rewrite-resubmit + (c) diverse vulture-judge personas. Recombination — re-grind is mainstream.
